name: stackure
description: Official Stackure authentication SDK for JavaScript and TypeScript

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/middleware.ts src/client.ts src/types.ts src/errors.ts src/validation.ts --format cjs,esm --dts
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/middleware.ts src/client.ts src/types.ts src/errors.ts src/validation.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --watch

author: Stackure
